disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dizziness is strictly postural — comes on every time she stands and eases on sitting/lying
trigger_question_examples: When exactly does the dizziness come on?
Does it happen when you stand up, or all the time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hits me the moment I stand up — I go all dizzy and unsteady. If I sit back down it settles a bit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High pill burden — around twelve daily medications prescribed by multiple uncoordinated clinicians
trigger_question_examples: How many medications is she taking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are about twelve tablets in all — some from a heart doctor, some from the joint specialist, and some from the GP. Nobody seems to look at the whole list.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent nausea began after a strong painkiller was started, and another tablet was later added to settle the nausea
trigger_question_examples: When did the nausea start compared with the tablets?
Was any medicine added to help the nausea?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The queasiness came on after the strong back painkiller, and then they gave me another tablet to try to stop the sickness.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent minor fall in the context of the dizziness
trigger_question_examples: Did you hurt yourself or hit your head?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a little fall yesterday when I stood up. I didn't hit my head, just a bit of a fright and a sore hip.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent unexplained nosebleeds while taking an anti-inflammatory tablet
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a few nosebleeds lately for no real reason, which isn't like me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A brief episode of acute confusion in the past week
trigger_question_examples: Has she seemed muddled or more confused than usual?
Any change in her thinking or alertness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There was one day last week where she seemed really muddled and not herself — it passed, but it worried me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dizziness is not a constant spinning vertigo and is not present when lying still
trigger_question_examples: Is the room spinning even when you lie still?
Does the dizziness happen when you're not moving?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not spinning and it doesn't happen when I'm lying still — it's only when I get up.
